sglang.title: Fix addr reuse in check_port
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?
After a socket is closed, it comes into TIME_WAIT status and refuses other socket listeners to bind it. TIME_WAIT normally lasts 30s and causes troubles when we want to fix the HTTP server port between frequently shutdown/starting SRT.
Add a SO_REUSEADDR option when checking th

sglang.title: Add SSL Cert Functionality
sglang.author: nivibilla
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Adds a verify parameter to the RuntimeEndpoint and modifies utils.py.
can be used like
runtime = sgl.RuntimeEndpoint(url, verify='./ca_bundle.crt')

This doesn't modify any of the openai python interactions since we can just do this instead
import httpx
import openai
client = openai.Client(
    base

sglang.title: Refactor ChatTemplate for Enhanced Clarity and Efficiency
sglang.author: cubxxw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
CHANGER

Simplification of conditional logic to reduce code duplication and increase clarity.
Utilization of enumerate in loops for improved readability and direct access to both index and value.
Optimization of prefix and suffix retrieval by leveraging dict.get for more concise and safe access.
Str

vllm.title: [FIX] Fix styles in automatic prefix caching & add a automatic prefix caching benchmark
vllm.author: zhuohan123

vllm.title: Make it easy to profile workers with nsight
vllm.author: pcmoritz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes it easy to profile models with higher tensor parallelism with Ray. It can for example be used with
python benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model "mistralai/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1" --tensor-parallel-size 2 --num-iters 10 --ray-workers-use-nsight --input-len 2200 --output-len 200

T

vllm.title: [DOC] add setup document to support neuron backend
vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the setup steps in the document, in order to provide a general guide on prepare trn1/inf2 instances for inference with Neuron SDK.
To perform offline inference with Inferentia, the changes in PR #2569 are required.

vllm.title: [Minor Fix] Remove unused code in benchmark_prefix_caching.py
vllm.author: gty111
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since prefix_pos is not an argument in LLM.generate at present, we should remove it in the benchmark_prefix_caching.py. This may confuse some people who are unfamilar with prefix caching.
#3158
cc @zhuohan123
